summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a top‑drawer 1973 show with Bill Kreutzmann’s fire‑driven drumming.
review: The new matrix blend is praised as crystal‑clear and immersive, delivering what reviewers call “perfect sound.” The performance itself is described as a classic, high‑energy set that kicks off with Bill going crazy on drums and never lets up, making it one of the best shows of ’73. Overall both the music and the recording are celebrated by listeners.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers are enthusiastic, two give 5‑star ratings and one provides only qualitative praise; the show is hailed as a top‑drawer classic while the matrix source is described as amazing sounding.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix blend praised as crystal‑clear, immersive and free of noticeable issues; reviewers highlight “amazing sounding” and “perfect sound.”

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy opening with Bill Kreutzmann’s drumming sets a relentless pace; reviewers note the show maintains that intensity throughout.

band_member_comments.Drums: Bill Kreutzmann’s drumming is highlighted as wild, relentless and a driving force for the entire performance.
